case_title: NICOLE C WISE VS. POPLAR INVESTMENT ASSOCIATE LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-07-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SENT TO DEFENDANT VIA CERTIFIED MAIL ON 8/16/16, LESS THAN THIRTY DAYS AGO. DEFENDANT'S MAILING ADDRESS IS OUTSIDE THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF NICOLE C. WISE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT POPLAR INVESTMENT ASSOCIATE, LLC. PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.
